desc: Extract src/lib/exploration/ from roadmap into standalone @roadmap/explore package. Roadmap keeps the contract types (ObservationResult, ExploreResult, ObservationSpec, runtime-explore ValidationRule). The runtime and Playwright helpers move out. Roadmap's validation handler for runtime-explore accepts ExploreResult but doesn't import the implementation.

init-package.desc: Create packages/explore/ with package.json, tsconfig.json, and entry point. Package name: @roadmap/explore. Peer dependency on @playwright/test (not bundled).

validate.command: node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('packages/explore/package.json','utf8')); if(p.name!=='@roadmap/explore') throw 'wrong name'; if(!p.peerDependencies?.['@playwright/test']) throw 'missing peer dep'"

package-types.desc: Create packages/explore/src/types.ts with the observation types that helpers return (ObservationResult, ExploreResult, ObservationSpec). These are standalone copies — no import from roadmap. Roadmap's protocol types remain the canonical source; this package defines compatible types independently.

move-helpers.desc: Move 8 helper modules (click, drag, size, style, text, type, visibility, wait) from src/lib/exploration/ to packages/explore/src/. Update imports: ObservationResult comes from a local types.ts that re-exports the interface (no dependency on roadmap internals).

move-runtime.desc: Move runtime.ts (launchApp, runExploreScript, mapObservationsToChecks, teardown) to packages/explore/src/runtime.ts. The runtime uses child_process + CDP, not Playwright directly. Its types (LaunchHandle, ExploreScriptResult) move with it.

barrel-export.desc: Create packages/explore/src/index.ts barrel that re-exports all helpers, runtime, and types. This replaces src/index.explore.ts.

package-tests.desc: Write tests for the standalone package. At minimum: type compatibility (ObservationResult shape matches roadmap's), barrel exports all 36+ helpers, runtime types exported.

validate.command: cd packages/explore && npx vitest run tests/

sever-roadmap-imports.desc: Remove src/lib/exploration/ directory and src/index.explore.ts from roadmap. Update src/index.ts to remove re-exports of launchApp, runExploreScript, mapObservationsToChecks, teardown, LaunchHandle, ExploreScriptResult. Update src/lib/protocol/validation.ts runtime-explore handler to accept ExploreResult without importing the runtime. Keep ObservationResult/ExploreResult/ObservationSpec in protocol types.

remove-playwright-dep.desc: Remove @playwright/test from roadmap's devDependencies. Verify tsc --noEmit still passes (no remaining imports of @playwright/test in src/).

roadmap-tests-pass.desc: Verify roadmap's full test suite passes without explore module. All 413+ existing tests must still pass.

explore-extraction-complete.desc: Terminal node. @roadmap/explore is a standalone package, roadmap has no Playwright dependency, all tests pass in both packages.
